description:
Extend AI meeting search with filters for date range, participant, meeting type, and topic tags. Support natural language queries like 'show me all meetings where pricing was discussed last month'.

**Rationale:** As meeting history grows, basic keyword search becomes insufficient. Semantic + faceted filtering helps users find specific decisions or commitments across hundreds of past meetings.
title: Meeting Search with Semantic Filtering
